name: IR Blaster (ESPhome)
author: Ava
description: IR blaster for Home Assistant via ESPHome
detail_description: Consumer IR + USB detection, Default TCP port 6054.

config.label: Enable IR API Server
config.description: Advertise this device to Home Assistant as an ESPHome infrared emitter.

config.label: TCP Port
config.description: ESPHome native API port Home Assistant connects to.
config.dialogHint: Default 6054. Keep it different from Ava's own ESPHome port (6053). Add it in HA via Settings > Devices > Add Integration > ESPHome, host = this device IP, port = this value, leave the encryption key blank.

config.label: Listen Address
config.description: Bind address for the API server.
config.dialogHint: 0.0.0.0 allows LAN clients (typical). Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only.

config.label: mDNS Discovery
config.description: Broadcast _esphomelib._tcp so Home Assistant auto-discovers this device.

config.label: Show Diagnostic Entities
config.description: Expose server status, detected emitter, last transmit, and a restart button in Home Assistant.
